goal: admin@costas.com can sign in, land on a protected /admin route, and review every PENDING workshop with certificate preview — no non-admin can reach the route or its data
why: M1 captures workshop registrations but nothing reviews them. This phase adds the verification data model and the read-only admin surface that the approve/reject actions in Phase 2 will act on.
success_criteria: Navigating to /admin as admin@costas.com renders the dashboard; navigating as owner/mechanic returns redirect('/') with no admin data in the body (VERIF-01, VERIF-07)
The dashboard lists every status='pending' workshop with name, serial, registration timestamp, and a signed-URL certificate preview link (VERIF-02)

Migration 0006_workshop_verification.sql adds status (pending|verified|rejected, default pending), reviewed_at, rejection_reason, and an admin-only RLS policy; existing rows default to pending (VERIF-07)
npx tsc --noEmit exits 0 after the migration types, role plumbing, and route are added
All new UI strings exist in BOTH el and en in lib/i18n.ts; no raw hex in the new JSX

tasks.title: Schema: workshop verification columns + admin RLS + typegen
acceptance_criteria: Migration adds status (text not null default 'pending' check in pending|verified|rejected), reviewed_at (timestamptz null), rejection_reason (text null) to public.workshops; existing rows default to pending
Migration adds admin-scoped RLS policy workshops_admin_all FOR ALL TO authenticated USING/WITH CHECK app_metadata.role = 'admin', leaving existing workshops_select_own/insert_own/update_own untouched
database.types.ts workshops Row/Insert/Update gain status, reviewed_at, rejection_reason with correct nullability
Migration header notes it is applied via Supabase MCP by operator, not the CLI
tasks.action: Create supabase/migrations/0006_workshop_verification.sql with three add-column statements (status with CHECK + default) and the workshops_admin_all policy exactly as specified; RLS already enabled in 0001 so do not re-enable. Hand-edit database.types.ts workshops block (lines 104-130) to add the three fields to Row/Insert/Update matching the migration. Do not run npx supabase gen types.

tasks.title: Extend role plumbing: getSessionRole + sign-in routing for admin
acceptance_criteria: getSessionRole() returns 'admin' when app_metadata.role is 'admin', still returns null for unrecognized/unauthenticated
Successful admin sign-in redirects to /admin; mechanic to /mechanic; owner to /
Role is still read only from app_metadata, never user_metadata
tasks.action: In session.ts add 'admin' to the SessionRole union (line 4) and to the getSessionRole guard (line 40). In auth-actions.ts signIn, replace the final redirect ternary with redirect(role === 'admin' ? '/admin' : role === 'mechanic' ? '/mechanic' : '/'), keeping redirect() outside try/catch.

tasks.title: Protected /admin route: pending-workshops review list with cert preview
acceptance_criteria: /admin as admin@costas.com lists every status='pending' workshop with name, serial (mono/tabular-nums), registration timestamp, and a View certificate link opening the signed URL in a new tab
/admin as owner/mechanic/unauthenticated issues redirect('/') before any workshop data is fetched — no admin data in the body
Empty state (bilingual adminEmpty) renders when there are no pending workshops
All UI text via t.* present in both el and en; Greek-primary; no raw hex in JSX; certificate signed URLs use a 60s TTL via createSignedUrl
tasks.action: Add admin i18n keys (adminTitle, adminSubtitle, adminPendingCount, adminColName, adminColSerial, adminColRegistered, adminEmpty) to the Translation type and both el/en dicts. Create src/app/admin/page.tsx (async server component): getSessionRole() then redirect('/') if not admin; query pending workshops; createSignedUrl(cert_path,60) per row; pass data to <AdminReviewList/>. Create src/components/AdminReviewList.tsx ('use client', useLang()) rendering cards plus the adminEmpty empty state.
